items.title: 'He liked the fear in our eyes,' Epstein survivors tell BBC
items.summary: In an interview with BBC Newsnight, five women abused by the disgraced financier describe the impact of their shared ordeal.

items.title: Danish PM fails to secure majority in party's weakest election showing since 1903

items.summary: The owner of Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp has been found liable by a court in New Mexico.

items.summary: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.

items.summary: The Philippines' VP faces another impeachment round with her 2028 presidential run on the line.

items.title: Decline in migratory fish populations prompts fight for protection

items.title: Danes vote as PM Mette Frederiksen seeks third term after Greenland boost

items.summary: The Hercules military transport plane crashed minutes after take-off near Colombia's southern border with Peru.

items.title: Elon Musk's Starlink blocked from operating in Namibia
items.summary: Namibia's regulator noted that Starlink's subsidiary is not locally owned.

items.title: Jury orders Cosby to pay nearly $60m to ex-waitress after finding he abused her in 1972
items.summary: Donna Motsinger alleged Cosby gave her wine and a pill that left her incapacitated after picking her up in a limousine in 1972.

items.title: Referendum defeat leaves Italy's Meloni looking more vulnerable
items.summary: Meloni vowed to press on after losing a vote on constitutional reform many turned into a referendum on her government.

items.summary: Until further notice, motorists in Slovenia will be restricted to a maximum purchase of 50 litres of fuel per day.

items.title: US bans new foreign-made consumer internet routers
